name: InstantILL
label: Inter-library loans
description: InstantILL made Interlibrary loans less expensive & simpler for users, without the need for big deals. It helped power the global response to the COVID-19 pandemic through its implementation on RSCVD.org.

name: OAbutton
label: Open Access delivery
tagline: Get around paywalls in a click
description: For over a decade, since 2013, the Open Acces Button provided free access to papers legally by scouring the web and emailing authors. It could be used on the website, via plugins for Chrome and Firefox, or embedded it into any library system.
